seo.title: About Us - Hochi Interior
seo.description: Hochi Interior - Over 10 years of experience in premium wooden interior design and construction in Hanoi. Closed production process, professional execution and long-term warranty.
seo.keywords: about hochi interior, furniture brand story, hanoi furniture workshop, 10 years interior experience

about.story_quote: Born from a deep passion for materials and the art of shaping spaces, HOCHI does more than design interiors - we define a way of living.
about.story_p1: With more than a decade of experience, HOCHI has established its position in premium interior design and construction in Vietnam. We carefully select and harmonize natural wood, premium plastics, metal, glass and modern materials to create luxurious, distinctive and timeless living spaces.
about.story_p2: Every HOCHI project is a personal statement where the homeowner's taste, status and personality are expressed with refinement and inspiration.
about.story_p3: With a closed production process that blends advanced technology and handcrafted artistry, HOCHI is committed to delivering value beyond furniture - a living experience worthy of your standards.

reasons.material_desc: Every material is strictly selected for outstanding durability, refined aesthetics and long-lasting value.
reasons.design_desc: Each space is designed around the homeowner's style and real needs.
reasons.construction_desc: Skilled craftspeople, standardized drying process and internationally aligned installation standards.

seo.title: Why Choose Us
seo.description: Outstanding advantages of Hochi Interior: premium materials, fast execution, talented craftspeople and reliable warranty.

values.quality_desc: Carefully selected premium materials meeting international standards, crafted with precision to create lasting value.
values.speed_desc: Modern production processes shorten construction timelines while preserving absolute craftsmanship.
values.expert_desc: A team of experienced architects and artisans gives HOCHI more than a decade of expertise in interior design and craftsmanship, with deep understanding of styles from modern and minimalist to luxury and neo-classical.
values.warranty_desc: A 1-year warranty for all HOCHI interior products, ensuring construction quality and peace of mind throughout use.

process_items: Carefully selected and standardized materials for stable, long-term durability.
Multi-layer high-tech coating for refined beauty, durability and safety.
Traditional joinery combined with CNC precision up to 0.1mm.
Turnkey installation and handover with dedicated 24/7 service.
why_choose.quote: We do not just sell furniture; we create dream living spaces where every homeowner finds true peace and distinction.

seo.title: Partners
seo.description: HOCHI is proud to work with trusted partners, bringing customers refined and seamless experiences.

partner.section_description: We are proud to collaborate with reputable partners across many fields, delivering high-quality products and solutions that meet strict standards. With a sustainable development mindset, HOCHI values long-term partnership and shared value creation for customers in Vietnam.
partner.description_fallback: Detailed partner information is being updated...
partner.select_prompt: Please select a partner above to view details.

detail.cooperation_note: We believe this partnership will bring practical and lasting value. Beyond providing high-quality products, both sides aim to deliver excellent user experiences and outstanding after-sales service.

seo.title: Home
seo.description: Hochi Interior - Premium wooden furniture production and construction workshop in Hanoi. Custom design, made-to-measure furniture, free delivery and installation. Hotline: 0326 908 884.
seo.keywords: hochi interior, premium wooden furniture, hanoi furniture workshop, interior design, interior construction, walnut wood, kitchen cabinets, beds, sofa

faq.q1: What does Hochi Interior specialize in producing?
faq.a1: Hochi Interior specializes in producing and installing premium wooden furniture: kitchen cabinets, beds, sofas, dining tables, TV shelves, wardrobes and more. Designs are customized to customer needs.
faq.q2: Does Hochi Interior offer home delivery?
faq.a2: Yes. Hochi Interior provides free delivery and installation for orders over 2 million VND in Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, Hai Phong, Binh Duong and Dong Nai.
faq.q3: How long does custom furniture production take?
faq.a3: Production takes 7-30 days depending on product complexity. In-stock products are delivered within 1-7 days. We provide free consultation and 3D design.
faq.q4: Does Hochi Interior accept made-to-measure orders?
faq.a4: Yes. We make furniture to each customer's dimensions and requirements, even for a single item. 3D design is free.
faq.q5: Where is the Hochi Interior workshop?
faq.a5: Hochi Interior has a production workshop in Hanoi. Contact hotline 0326 908 884 for consultation and detailed address information.

showcase.title: PREMIUM INTERIOR 102
showcase.description: With a talented and experienced team of designers and builders, we proudly deliver exquisite furniture products that meet international quality standards.
showcase.perfection_desc: From raw materials to every carved detail, everything is meticulously crafted. Our finished products deliver not only high aesthetic value but also a commitment to quality and timeless durability.
showcase.showroom_desc: Our modern showroom system in major cities allows customers to have the most intuitive and authentic view of their dream living space. Come and experience the difference in our design style.

features.title: REAL PROJECTS
features.years_desc: In the field of luxury villa and apartment interior design and construction. We are committed to delivering absolute satisfaction in aesthetics and functionality.
